tasks.instruction: Uzupelnij kazdy z ponizszych dialogow (1.1-1.6), wybierajac odpowiedz A, B lub C.

items.stem:
X: I'm really sorry about breaking your vase.
Y: _________
options: A) Don't worry about it. These things happen.
B) Don't worry about it. These things are happening.
C) Don't worry about it. These things have happened.

items.stem:
X: The food we were served was absolutely disgusting.
Y: _________
options: B) I do apologise for any inconvenience.
C) I apologise you for the inconvenience.

items.stem:
X: I'm afraid I've lost the book you lent me.
Y: _________
options: A) Oh no! I wish you would have been more careful.
B) Oh no! I wish you had been more careful.
C) Oh no! I wish you were more careful.

items.stem:
X: I'd like to make a complaint about the noise from room 214.
Y: _________
options: A) I'll look into it straight away.
B) I'll look it into straight away.
C) I'll look after it straight away.

items.stem:
X: You promised you'd pick me up at eight, and I waited for over an hour!
Y: _________
options: A) I know, and I can't apologise enough. I should have called.
B) I know, and I can't apologise enough. I should call.
C) I know, and I can't apologise enough. I must have called.

items.stem:
X: The product I ordered arrived damaged. I'd like a full refund.
Y: _________
options: A) I'm sorry to hear that. Let me to sort this out for you.
B) I'm sorry to hear that. Let me sort this out for you.
C) I'm sorry hearing that. Let me sort this out for you.
